title: Bodebojo's AFK Display
description: Datapack that shows when people are AFK
body:
[![Datapack Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5125ce0858c6a72134ecb5d382d79dd444369eb.png)]()

Bodebojo's AFK Display is a Minecraft datapack designed to enhance your multiplayer experience by providing notifications when players go AFK (Away From Keyboard) and when they return.

## Features
- **AFK Notifications**: Automatically sends a customized message to all players when someone goes AFK.
- **Wake Up Notifications**: Notifies players when someone returns from being AFK.
- **Configurable AFK Time**: Set the minimum time a player needs to be inactive before being considered AFK.
- **Gray AFK Names**: Option to change the names of AFK players to gray for easy identification.
- **Customized Messages**: Includes a variety of fun messages for both AFK and wake-up notifications.
- **Easy Setup**: Simple installation and configuration process.

## Commands
- **/function bojos_afk_display:config**: Access the configuration menu to customize settings.

## Configuration
The datapack includes a configuration system that allows you to adjust various settings to suit your server's needs. You can change the minimum AFK time, toggle AFK and wake-up notifications, and decide whether AFK players' names should be displayed in gray.

---
